content.en:
These country lords investigated, and only knew that these human races were the same race as Ye Tian, and they should be the races of a small place, such as some crack worlds.

So, they didn't dig deeper.

With the arrival of a large number of forces in the Endless Realm, the Endless Realm has prospered just like the other Eternal Realms.

Moreover, the resources of the Endless Kingdom will continue to be nurtured in the future, which will also help them to grow ~ stronger.

......

Time flies.

Ye Tian's strength is still growing steadily, and the Eternal Dao Species and Eternal Dao Body are all improving.

this day.

Ye Tian began to use the Ruin Sun Disc again, and he was going to deduce the Advanced Eternal Dao Species and supply some human Eternal Dao Realm exchange cultivation.

In this way, even if it is exposed, the High Eternal Dao Seed will not let those forces go crazy, and when it is exposed, he will be able to withstand it with his strength.

But the perfect eternal Dao species, not to mention that there is a limit on the number of inheritances, even if there is no limit on the number of times, he doesn't dare to spread it around!

Time flies, Ye Tian has been constantly deduced, coupled with the experience of the previous deduction, it is easy to deduce a high-level Eternal Dao inheritance, but it has also made many replica bodies scrapped.

"This high-level Eternal Dao Seed inheritance is called the Endless Dao Seed!"

Ye Tian said.

He placed this Dao Inheritance in the Human Temple, and if there was an Eternal Dao Realm where his cultivation reached the required level, and he had made enough contributions, he could redeem this Dao Inheritance.

Of course.

He didn't announce the grade of the Endless Dao Seed, only when he actually exchanged it, he knew the grade of the Endless Dao Seed, and he needed to make an oath not to allow it to be spread and leaked, so there would be no big problem.

When the Endless Dao Seed Inheritance was released, many Eternal Dao Realms were excited.

Although they have not yet comprehended the rules of the Eternal Sequence to the Dao to the realm of perfection, and they are not qualified to cultivate the Eternal Dao Species, at least they don't have to worry about the inheritance of the Eternal Dao Seed in the future!

They had also communicated with the Eternal Dao Realms of other forces, but they knew very well the preciousness of the Eternal Dao Species, and even if they cultivated to the peak realm of the Eternal Dao Realm, they would not be able to obtain the Eternal Dao Seed Inheritance.

Of course.

Ye Tian also revealed the pros and cons of the Eternal Dao Species, whether these human beings want to cultivate in the Eternal Dao Realm or not, it is up to them.

But.

Since the opening of the Endless Realm, a lot of Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items have also been born in the territory, and some lucky human beings have also obtained a lot of Eternal Supreme Dao Realm, and there is really hope that they will comprehend the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rules to ten percent of the consummation realm in the near future.

That's it.

More than 30 million years have passed since the Dao era.

this day.

Inside the Terran Temple of the Endless Realm.

A Terran Eternal Dao Realm Lin Lei was staring at the endless Dao Inheritance in the exchange list, his heart full of longing.

Over the years, he has not only wandered in the Endless Realm, but also traveled to other Eternal Realms, and even had dealings with many forces, and has also obtained an Eternal Dao Inheritance, but it is the most rubbish Eternal Dao Species.

He knew very well what a spicy chicken Eternal Dao Seed was, and the Eternal Dao Seed of the Terran Temple should not be an inferior Eternal Dao Seed.

This news comes from several high-level human beings, judging from the information revealed, the endless Dao species should be the eternal Dao species above the primary level, and what kind of Dao species it is, with an oath constraint, the high-level human beings will not reveal it.

"The Endless Dao Seed Exchange Requirements are too high, and it will take too many years for me to exchange them! Moreover, I am very lucky, I have obtained an Eternal Primordial Treasure that helps to comprehend the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, as well as a number of Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items, and I have just comprehended the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rules to the consummation realm not long ago. Now, it is just right to cultivate the Eternal Dao Seed. "

The contribution value cannot be exchanged for treasures, but if you find a treasure or opportunity, you can hand it in, so as to obtain a large amount of contribution value.

"I know of a treasure land, and if I turn it in, I might be able to get a lot of contribution points!"

Lin Lei said secretly.

And in that place, he originally wanted to keep his strength in the future before entering, but it was better to exchange it for contribution points and exchange it for endless Dao species.

In case that place is discovered by other Eternal Dao Realms and someone else turns it in, then there will be no contribution value for him.

Thereupon.

He immediately contacted Ye Xingchen, one of the high-ranking members of the Terran Temple, to hand over this opportunity.

Ye Xingchen is here.

"I've seen the Lord of the Hall of Stars!"

Lin Lei said respectfully.

Ye Xingchen saw Lin Lei and nodded slightly: "Lin Lei, you want to hand over a treasure land, where is it?"

"In this location. Lin Lei said the specific location.

"Let's go over and take a look and evaluate the contribution again. Ye Xingchen took Lin Lei over.

They shuttled and shuttled, and soon came to a fringe of the Endless Realm.

"It's here!" Lin Lei pointed to a canyon and said, "It's here, but if you want to get in, you have to have a special way." "

I saw that Lin Lei urged the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rules to permeate the entire canyon, and suddenly one place actually hindered the power of the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, and even excluded it.

And Lin Lei continued to invade this point with the rules of the Eternal Sequence to Dao, and gradually, an entrance appeared.

"Let's go, go in and have a look!"

Ye Xingchen walked in with Lin Lei.

As soon as they entered here, their strength was suppressed, and the mist here seemed to be affecting Ye Xingchen's Eternal Dao Species.

However, his Eternal Dao Seed is a perfect Eternal Dao Seed, so there is nothing wrong with it.

"It's not easy here!" Ye Xingchen said.

"Star Hall Lord, this place is very dangerous, not long after I came in last time, I encountered a terrifying monster and was directly injured. However, there are a lot of resources here. Lin Lei said.

"You stay here, I'll go ahead and have a look!"

Ye Xingchen went deep to take a look.

And Lin Lei is waiting here.

After a period of time, Ye Xingchen suddenly came back, but he had a lot of injuries on his body.

"Let's go!"

Ye Xingchen came out with Lin Lei.

And Lin Lei was very shocked, he could understand Ye Xingchen's strength, when the Endless Realm had just allowed outside forces to settle in, there was an Eternal Dao Realm that had caused trouble, and was directly pressed by Ye Xingchen.

He had seen Ye Xingchen's strength, which was extremely powerful, far surpassing him now.

But Ye Xingchen, who was so powerful, was actually injured in that place.

"Lin Lei, this place does have a lot of resources, and there may even be some good things, but it is also very dangerous, I can't specifically judge it, I will ask my father to go over and take a look, and the specific contribution value will be announced to you later." Ye Xingchen said.

"Good!"

Lin Lei nodded.

Subsequently.

Ye Xingchen went to find his father Ye Tiantu.
